arts.ttl: Ancelotti defends Real Madrid Ballon d'Or snub
arts.sum: Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti maintains his side were right to boycott last year's Ballon d'Or after Vinicius Jr was beaten to the award by Manchester City's Rodri.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti defends Real's Ballon d'Or snub
arts.sum: Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti maintains his side were right to boycott last year's Ballon d'Or after Vinicius Jr was beaten to the award by Manchester City's Rodri.
Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola challenges Jack Grealish to prove him wrong and cement a first-team place after his FA Cup performance against Leyton Orient.

arts.ttl: Plymouth’s reward for beating Liverpool in FA Cup is a trip to Manchester City
arts.sum: The Pilgrims were given another Premier League high-flyer in Monday’s fifth round draw.

arts.ttl: Huijsen: The New Yoro? United and Real Madrid Set for Bidding War as Juventus Eyes Windfall
arts.sum: Dean Huijsen's meteoric rise at Bournemouth has caught the attention of European football's elite, with Manchester United and Real Madrid reportedly set to battle for his signature. This development could prove lucrative for Juventus, who shrewdly included a sell-on clause when transferring the young defender last summer. The post Huijsen: The New Yoro? United and Real Madrid Set for Bidding War as Juventus Eyes Windfall appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: FA Cup fifth round draw in full: Manchester City to face Premier League conquerors
arts.sum: Manchester City are handed an FA Cup fifth-round tie with Liverpool's conquerors Plymouth Arygle, while there are three all Premier League matches.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti explains why Manchester City are Real Madrid’s ‘toughest opponent’ despite struggles
arts.sum: Manchester City host the Spanish capital club in the first leg of their sizeable Champions League play-off clash

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: Madrid-Man City 'like a Clásico now'
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti said Manchester City vs. Real Madrid "feels like a Clásico now" as the teams prepare to meet in the Champions League for the fourth season in a row, and backed the tie's winner to "go far in the competition."

arts.ttl: Rodrygo: “The mentality of last season will be key to beating Manchester City”
arts.sum: Real Madrid put forward attacker Rodrygo Goes to speak to the media ahead of the UEFA Champions League play-off tie against Manchester City with the Brazilian analysing that, “it will be as tough as ever. I don’t know if something like that will happen again, I hope so, but it was the best.”

arts.ttl: The 5 Real Madrid stars who will miss 2nd leg if shown a yellow card vs Man City
arts.sum: Five members of the first-team ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid will be forced to walk the disciplinary tightrope in the club’s next outing. This comes with all five…
